title: Add Renode to CI pipeline
description: Run Renode-based firmware tests in GitHub Actions. Build for renode targets, spin up lichen-sim + Renode instances, run multi-node mesh tests. Validates firmware without hardware in CI. Software-only: workflow YAML, test harness scripts.
notes: Can start with existing STM32WL (nucleo_wl55jc) target. Expand to nRF52/ESP32 boards as they become available.
